sourceTitle: NUS Policy for Use of AI in Teaching and Learning
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The use of AI tools to provide instruction to learners in the form of responses, feedback and/or marks, whether as virtual tutors or as markers, requires prior approval by Head of Department or relevant Deanery, under the oversight of Chair of the AI-COP. Approval must be sought through submission of an AI Risk Assessment.
